environmentConstraints: Delegated Task/subagent launches failed with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-xhigh`; flow validation was completed directly in-session after the failed delegation attempt.

Passive runtime probes remained degraded during this round: `http://localhost:9090/actuator/health` returned HTTP 503 with `{"status":"DOWN"}`, `http://localhost:8081/actuator/health` returned HTTP 404, while TCP connects to `127.0.0.1:8081` and `127.0.0.1:5433` still succeeded. The operations-review assertion set was documentation-only and remained fully testable via `docs/code-review/**`.
